title: Login Authentication Failure
description: Users reporting 401 errors when attempting to log in with OAuth2 provider.

title: Broken CSS on Dashboard
description: The sidebar navigation overlaps with the main content on mobile views.

title: API Rate Limiting Issue
description: Internal microservices are hitting rate limits unexpectedly during batch processing.

title: Update Billing Address
description: Customer needs to update their physical billing address for tax compliance.

title: Database Connection Timeout
description: Production DB is timing out every 10 minutes during the cron job execution.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: User requested a dark mode toggle for the web application.

title: PDF Export Error
description: Exporting reports to PDF results in a 'File Not Found' error.

title: Security Vulnerability Patch
description: Urgent request to patch CVE-2026-1234 in the main gateway.

title: Slow Search Queries
description: Searching for users by email takes over 5 seconds to return results.

title: Welcome Email Not Sent
description: New sign-ups from the last 2 hours have not received their verification links.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: The password reset link expires in 2 minutes instead of the documented 30 minutes.

title: UI Text Typo
description: The 'Submit' button on the contact page is misspelled as 'Submt'.
